title: centaurea cana subsp. matthiolifolia
intro: Centaurea cana subsp. matthiolifolia, also known as Silver Knapweed or Blue Mountain Centaury, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating digestive issues, relieving pain and fever, and supporting respiratory health. Centaurea cana subsp. matthiolifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine, though its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual tolerance.
